commit a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f2a3b4c5d6e7f8a9b0
Author: Alice Wang <alice@example.com>
Date:   Mon Apr 14 10:30:00 2026 +0800

    feat: add git status filter for gw proxy

    Implement StatusFilter that strips teaching hints from git status
    output while preserving branch name and file listings.

    This makes the output more compact and suitable for LLM context.

    Signed-off-by: Alice Wang <alice@example.com>
    Co-authored-by: Bob Li <bob@example.com>
    Signed-off-by: Charlie Zhang <charlie@example.com>

    refactor: extract filter interface and registry

    Move filter-related types into their own package for better
    separation of concerns.

    Signed-off-by: Bob Li <bob@example.com>

    and internal runner for local command execution.
